scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:api: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $port = 8016; $connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach ($c in $connections) { if ($c.OwningProcess) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Set-Location apps/api; if (Test-Path ../../.venv/Scripts/uvicorn.exe) { ../../.venv/Scripts/uvicorn.exe main:app --reload --reload-exclude=generated/* --port $port } else { python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --reload-exclude=generated/* --port $port }"
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @3dagent/web run lint && npm --workspace @3dagent/admin run lint
scripts.build: npm --workspace @3dagent/web run build && npm --workspace @3dagent/admin run build
